productDisplayName: Nike Men As Ss Trainin Blue T-Shirts
description: CompositionBlue T-shirt made of 100% polyester Dri-Fit fabric, has a round neck, short raglan sleeves, black panel on the front with diagonal grey mesh panel and blue panel towards the hemline, mesh panels on the sides, printed seal on the upper back neck and printed swoosh logo on the upper right chest FittingRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not bleach Tumble dry on lowCool iron onlyDo not dry cleanDo not iron on print or embroideryTake your training to the next level in this blue T-shirt from nike. The mesh Dri-Fit fabric pulls sweat away from the skin to help keep you cool and comfortable, while the sporty design with the raglan sleeves gives an added edge. Team this with track pants and performance shoes so that you can train longer and better.
